plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root cause identified:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`.

### The Bug

In `processItems`, the loop condition is `i < items.length - 1`, which causes it to stop *one iteration early*, skipping the last element:

```typescript
// BUGGY
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {

// FIXED — remove the "- 1"
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

### Impact on existing tests

3 of the 4 `processItems` tests are currently **failing**:
| Test | Expected | Actual (buggy) |
|------|----------|----------------|
| 3-item array | `["HELLO","WORLD","FOO"]` | `["HELLO","WORLD"]` |
| 1-item array | `["TEST"]` | `[]` |
| 2-item array | `["A","B"]` | `["A"]` |

The empty-array test already passes and will not regress.

### Fix

**One change:** `src/utils.ts` — remove `- 1` from the loop condition. All 6 tests will pass after.
